senses.definition_en: parts of speech (n. for noun, adj. for adjective, etc.). This is not an oversight on our

senses.definition_en: praise, good character trait or habit

senses.definition_dg: Salamu za kuuza hali; habari gani?

senses.definition_dg: Kula; neno fupi ra kutoka.

examples.en: From there, go to the village.

senses.definition_dg: Tundu ra nguwo ambaro lifungo rinaingira.
